basic_details.job_title: ICMR NINE Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute of NCD Epidemiology (ICMR NINE)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute of NCD Epidemiology (ICMR NINE) Young Professional – I & II Recruitment 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website icmr.nic.in . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NINE Young Professional – I & II Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 30 to 35 years who have a Graduate or Postgraduate degree with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Young Professional – I & II vacancies. The email application process for ICMR NINE Young Professional Recruitment 2026 has started on 13 May 2026 and will remain open until 02 Ju

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for YP-I, Max 35 years for YP-II
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Young Professional – I: 30 years Maximum Age Limit for Young Professional – II: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per ICMR/Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate (55%) + 1 year experience, Postgraduate (55%) + 3 years experience
qualification.details: Young Professional – I (AI/ML): Graduate with at least 55% of marks in Data Science/ Statistics/Computer Application/Information Technology/Computer Science/ or Artificial Intelligence, with one-year experience in the relevant fields/Subjects. Young Professional – II (Public Policy & Evidence Translation): Masters/Postgraduate with at least 55% of marks in Public Health (MPH), Health Policy, Epidemiology, Health Systems, Health Economics, or Public Policy from a recognized institution with Three-year post qualification experience in relevant field. Young Professional – II (Scientific Communication & Media): Master's degree with at least 55% marks in Science Communication, Public Health Communication, Mass Communication, Journalism, Digital Media, or Public Health with Three year of post qualification experience in the related field.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Young Professional – II (Public Policy & Evidence Translation)

salary_details.details: Young Professional – I: Rs. 35,000/- - Rs. 42,000/- Per Month Young Professional – II: Rs. 35,000/- - Rs. 42,000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR NINE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR NINE Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICMR NINE Young Professional posts is 02nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Young Professional – I and Young Professional – II positions ranges from Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for Young Professional – I (AI/ML)?
faq.answer: For Young Professional – I (AI/ML), candidates need a Graduate degree with at least 55% marks in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Application, IT, Computer Science, or AI, along with one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Young Professional – II posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Young Professional – II posts is 35 years. For Young Professional – I, it is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a written test and an interview or personal discussion.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Young Professional – I & II posts at ICMR NINE.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q9. Where is ICMR NINE located?
faq.answer: ICMR National Institute of NCD Epidemiology (ICMR NINE) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 562110.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations provided?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per the rules of ICMR and the Government of India.
